nasb.text: and are proclaiming customs which it is not lawful for us to accept or to observe, being Romans.”

esv.text: They advocate customs that are not lawful for us as Romans to accept or practice.”

cnv.text: 傳我們羅馬人不准接受、不准實行的規例。”

ccb.text: 宣扬我们罗马人不可接受或实行的风俗。”

csbs.text: 传讲我们罗马人不可以接受、也不能遵守的规矩。”
